case_title: SYLVIA BARGELLINI VS. TRITERRA REALTY GROUP, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.50 FILED BY BARGELLINI, SYLVIA AS TO DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SYLVIA BARGELLINI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP, INC., REPRESENTED BY HALEY GONZABA, SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED SEP-09-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARGELLINI, SYLVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRITERRA REALTY GROUP, INC. $20.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $65.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
